ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Tier category of the content (foreign key to content_tiers) */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the content (0 for movies) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the content (foreign key to content_categories) */,
  "first_view_quarter_id" INTEGER /* First quarter in which the content was viewed (foreign key to view_quarters) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model used for predicting first views (foreign key to predictive_models) */,
  "first_views" REAL /* Number of first views in the first quarter */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the content */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer(s) of the content */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast members of the content */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer(s) of the content */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Production budget of the content */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Marketing budget of the content */,
  "release_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the content was released */,
  "is_sequel" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is a sequel */,
  "prequel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prequel content (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_first_view_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("first_view_quarter_id") REFERENCES view_quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_prequel_id FOREIGN KEY ("prequel_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES content_tiers ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tier category (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tier category */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the tier */,
  "visibility_score" INTEGER /* Visibility score of the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the content category (e.g., Documentary Features, Scripted Comedy Series) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the season belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_title" TEXT /* Title of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., 2022Q3) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the quarter */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Quarter number (1-4) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model (e.g., xgb) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data used for the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the content was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used to access the content (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the metadata belongs to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the content */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the content was produced */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards the content has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_metadata_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the content */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
